scripts.fix: pnpm exec biome format --write . --format-with-errors true || true
scripts.flint: pnpm run fix && pnpm run lint
scripts.supabase:gen-types: echo '/* eslint-disable @typescript-eslint/no-redundant-type-constituents */' > src/shared/supabase/database.types.ts && yes | npx supabase gen types typescript --project-id kremuphdcxwgceravqfh >> src/shared/supabase/database.types.ts && pnpm run fix
